data.title: FatPipe Stock Rips 126% On Nasdaq Debut Before Paring Some Gains After-Hours
data.description: FatPipe shares skyrocketed 126.08% to $13.00 from their initial public offering price of $5.75 per share during their Nasdaq debut, before sliding 20.77% to $10.30 in after-hours trading.

data.title: Meta Restricts Live Streaming For Teens Under 16 As Part Of Expanded Safety Measures
data.description: Meta Platforms announced new restrictions for teen users, prohibiting those under 16 from live streaming on Instagram without parental permission, as the company expands its Teen Account protections across its platforms.

data.title: Mark Cuban Once Pitched Bitcoin As A Hedge Against Economic Turmoil—No Surprises The 'Shark' Still Finds BTC A Better Buy Amid Tariff Woes
data.description: Mark Cuban, an early Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) investor and proponent of its safe haven narrative, continued to put his weight behind the apex cryptocurrency amid ongoing trade war-induced economic fears.

data.title: Trump Tariffs Push EU To Hit $23 Billion In US Exports, Including Orange Juice, Poulty, And Steel From Red States
data.description: EU responds to Trump's tariffs with own strategic move targeting exports from conservative US states, adding pressure on Trump's political base.

data.title: Dow Dips Over 300 Points As US-China Trade Tensions Escalate: Apple, Tesla, Nvidia, Amazon Decline, Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
data.description: Apple, Tesla, Amazon, and Nvidia shares dropped. Walgreens reported good earnings. All sectors of S&P 500 closed in the red.
